misc: Doubles as a professional model as his side hustle
Few players dare to give him lip due to his intimidating presence and wrestling skills
biography: Olli, a formidable presence on the greens, hails from the esteemed Helsingin Golfklubi. Beyond his golfing prowess, Olli also works as a professional model, showcasing a versatile range of talents.

Known for his intimidating presence and rumored wrestling skills, few dare to challenge Olli directly, making him a respected figure among his peers. Olli is scheduled to make his ninth appearance at Hector Trophée in 2026, having participated in 8 previous editions of the tournament. While the coveted Hector Trophée and Victor Trophy have eluded him thus far, Olli's determination remains unwavering.
